openai/gpt-4o-mini._observations: Phase 6 re-baseline (post-fix, 2026-06-03) under threading_mode='prod' + REFINEMENT_STRUCTURED_PLAN_ENABLED=true, n=5 runs. The refinement_minimal_edit scorer carries the strict 1.0 merge gate per D-06-09 (REF-01). GATE STATUS: refinement_minimal_edit median == 1.0 on this run (4/5 = 1.0, 1/5 = 0.5; one stochastic miss).
